description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a dark green fuselage and prominent red star insignias on the wings and tail, reminiscent of Soviet World War II aircraft. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, with visible ailerons and flaps, and the tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned forward on the fuselage, with a clear canopy and a single seat visible. The landing gear is a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is painted red, matching the propeller tip. The surface appears metallic with some matte and glossy areas, and the overall build suggests a robust, functional design for combat or reconnaissance roles.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, mid-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. It features an enclosed forward cockpit and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, red engine cowling, forward cockpit canopy, and both main landing gear wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mid-mounted straight wing, red star insignias, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail structure, horizontal stabilizers, and the overall wingspan with visible insignias.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit canopy, wing, and tail details, mirroring the left side but from the opposite angle.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
